violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Keep hand sink accessible. Remove items from in front of hand sink.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Popcorn style ceiling texture not smooth or easily cleanable.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor needs cleaning in kitchen area.
Lighting. — --Existing light fixture does not provide adequate illumination.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material * was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Store Round-Up pesticides away from boxes of coffee cups in storage closet. Store spray bottle of OdorBan/Comet away from food items on kitchen counter.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
